EvidenceDraft.description: AI-produced claim data with no persistence or control instructions.
EvidenceDraft.title: EvidenceDraft

EvidenceExtractionRequest.description: Minimal AI input: normalized content, never database control or portfolio details.
EvidenceExtractionRequest.title: EvidenceExtractionRequest

ExternalDocumentContent.description: Untrusted source-controlled fields; never interpreted as system instructions.
ExternalDocumentContent.title: ExternalDocumentContent

IdempotencyKey.description: Stable key and payload digest required for mutating application operations.
IdempotencyKey.title: IdempotencyKey

Money.description: A non-negative monetary value with an explicit currency.
Money.title: Money

MoneyRange.description: A non-binding amount range used only in advisory output.
MoneyRange.title: MoneyRange

PortfolioAIRiskSummary.description: Privacy-minimized portfolio input permitted to leave the local machine.
PortfolioAIRiskSummary.title: PortfolioAIRiskSummary

PortfolioImportRequest.description: Local-only input for a future CSV or OCR adapter.
PortfolioImportRequest.title: PortfolioImportRequest

RawDocument.description: Aggregate whose shape makes the trust boundary explicit.
RawDocument.title: RawDocument

RawDocumentControl.description: System-owned fields kept separate from untrusted external content.
RawDocumentControl.title: RawDocumentControl

SourceFetchResult.title: SourceFetchResult

StorageWriteRequest.title: StorageWriteRequest
